question.text: When was the Chicago Board of Trade (CBOT) established?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** CBOT was established in 1848 in the USA. The London Metal Exchange (LME) was established in 1877 in the UK. **The Trap:** 1730 is the Osaka Rice Exchange (Japan). 1877 is LME. 1875 is the Bombay Cotton Trade Association (India). **Cross-Exam Context:** Series VIII and XIII also reference CBOT as a major derivatives exchange. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** CBOT is now part of the CME Group, the world's largest futures exchange. Knowing these milestones helps in client conversations about market maturity.
